email_subject: Application for Manual Worker at Katoen Natie Desteldonk
email_body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the Manual Worker position at Katoen Natie Desteldonk, as advertised via KONVERT HR. With previous warehouse experience at Katoen Natie Antwerp, I am familiar with the physical demands and safety standards of your operations. I am physically strong, comfortable with the two-shift system, and speak good English. I am motivated to learn and ready to start as soon as possible.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the Manual Worker position at Katoen Natie Desteldonk, as advertised via KONVERT HR. Having previously worked at Katoen Natie Antwerp in a warehouse and logistics role, I am already familiar with your company's high standards for safety, efficiency, and teamwork. I am physically strong, unafraid of hard work, and comfortable with the two-shift system (6h-14h and 14h-22h). I speak good English and can communicate effectively with colleagues and supervisors.

In my previous role at Katoen Natie, I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a fast-paced logistics environment. I am experienced with loading and unloading trucks, sorting goods, packing materials, and preparing shipments. I am also comfortable operating smaller warehouse machines and am eager to learn any additional equipment you use.

I am motivated, reliable, and ready to start immediately. I value safety and teamwork, and I am looking for a long-term opportunity where I can grow within the company. The training on the floor and the possibility of a permanent contract are very appealing to me.

I would welcome the chance to discuss how my experience and work ethic can contribute to your team. Thank you for considering my application.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

Motivated, reliable, and ready to start immediately
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE

Comfortable with physical tasks, two-shift systems, and working both independently and as part of a team. Good English communication skills. Ready to start immediately and eager to learn on the job.

CORE SKILLS
- Physical stamina and strength for manual work
- Loading and unloading trucks
- Sorting and packing goods
- Stocking and preparing shipments
- Safety-conscious
- Teamwork and independence
- Good English (spoken)

EXPERIENCE

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Handled physical tasks including loading, unloading, sorting, and packing goods

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
